scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: GF source 391f0cd remains pinned. The turn-flow integration added GameMoveTurnAction and GameTurnSystem while the notification migration removed HudMessagePayload, a net increase of one project runtime class. Leak maxima remain unchanged until a full-suite regression demonstrates a class-registration delta.
